network_summary: Dental 360 is a branded multi-location DSO network operating 28+ locations across Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana under the 'Dental 360' brand and several local trade names (Irving Park Family Dentist, Family Dental Group, Lawndale Dental Center, etc.). Both cluster locations — 3435 W Irving Park Rd (ZIP 60618) and 3855 W North Ave (ZIP 60647) — are explicitly listed on the official Dental 360 network website (dental360usa.com, dental360grp.com). Ivana Bueno is the Director of Operations, a management/administrative role; she is the authorized official on federal NPPES filings for these offices in that capacity, not as a solo owner-dentist. No private equity sponsor, MSO/management-services entity, or PE-platform layer was documented in public sources.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Ivana Bueno is Director of Operations (administrative/management role), NOT a solo owner-dentist. The AO signal here reflects a corporate officer filing on behalf of the Dental 360 branded DSO network — this is not a dentist-owned multi-office private group. No PE sponsor or MSO layer documented; classify pe_backed=false.
evidence_chain: AO signal: IVANA BUENO appears as authorized official on two distinct IL GP location NPIs across ZIP 60618 and 60647. Documentary corroboration: (1) dental360grp.com/locations/ explicitly lists both addresses — 3435 W Irving Park Rd and 3855 W North Ave — as Dental 360 network locations; (2) dental360usa.com/locations/ confirms same; (3) Visual Visitor company profile identifies Ivana Bueno as 'Director of Operations' for Dental 360 Group, headquartered at 3435 W Irving Park Rd; (4) Yahoo Local listings for Ivana Bueno show AO role extended to Dental 360 Kenosha and Dental 360 Oak Creek LLC — confirming her multi-location administrative role across the network. No PE backer or MSO/management-services entity found in three web searches.
future_app_notes: Dental 360 is a large regional DSO brand (~28-30 locations across IL/WI/IN) with many Chicago locations operating under local trade names (Irving Park Family Dentist, Family Dental Group, Lawndale Dental Center, etc.). Other Dental 360 locations in watched Chicagoland ZIPs that do NOT share the IVANA BUENO AO but operate under the Dental 360 brand should be reviewed and promoted to dso_regional/dso_national as brand-match promotions. The two cluster locations are already classified dso_regional — consistent with branded_dso verdict. Watch for future PE/platform announcement; as of 2026-06-21 no PE backer found. The HQ entity is DENTAL 360 & ASSOCIATES LLC.
